name: 现代奢华客厅亲子互动场景
description_zh: 这是一个宽敞的现代奢华风大平层客厅，拥有挑高的天花板和巨大的落地窗。明亮温暖的自然阳光从窗外洒入，照在高端的木地板和柔软的地毯上。巨大的205cm灰色猫爬架位于画面左侧前景，底板紧贴画面最下方边缘，通过仰拍视角凸显其庞大、震撼的压迫感和极强的稳定性。猫爬架的最顶层趴着一只体型巨大的缅因猫，中间跳台上两只英短正在玩耍。在猫爬架坚固的双层底座旁，一名5岁左右的可爱小朋友坐在地毯上，正笑着挥舞逗猫棒，与底端吊床上的布偶猫进行亲密互动。背景是虚化的高级真皮沙发和极简艺术装饰，整体色调温暖、明亮，营造出富裕、欢乐、安全的家庭氛围。
description_en: A photorealistic, highly detailed image of a luxurious, spacious modern living room with high ceilings and large floor-to-ceiling windows letting in bright, warm natural sunlight. In the foreground, with its base touching the absolute bottom edge of the frame, stands a massive, towering 205cm plush grey XXL cat tree. The camera uses a distinct low-angle shot to emphasize the cat tree's imposing, giant size, solid presence, and extreme stability. On the highest tier, a huge majestic Maine Coon cat is resting imperiously. On the middle platforms, two chubby British Shorthair cats are playing playfully, utilizing the rich movement lines. Near the sturdy double-layered baseboard, a happy 5-year-old child sits on a premium fluffy rug, laughing and playing with a beautiful Ragdoll cat using a feather wand toy. In the soft-focus background, there is a high-end designer leather sofa and elegant minimalist decor. The overall tone is warm, joyful, affluent, and heartwarming. 8k resolution, architectural photography style, masterpiece, commercial lighting.
camera_angle: 低角度仰拍（广角），凸显高大压迫感

name: 优雅温馨平层晚间场景
description_zh: 在高端别墅的典雅客厅里，正值温馨的傍晚。环境光线主要来自背景里燃烧的现代壁炉和精致的暖色调落地灯，光线柔和且具有电影感，完美勾勒出猫爬架毛绒材质的质感。巨大的猫爬架放置在画面中央偏右，双层底板扎实地落在画面最底部。采用微仰视角拍摄，既展现了205cm的惊人高度，又清晰地展示了产品下半部横向延展的宽大空间。一只体型庞大的布偶猫正在底部的剑麻猫抓板上用力抓挠，展现产品的稳固不晃动；另一只大橘猫在宽敞的猫窝内安睡。在温馨虚化的背景中，一位母亲带着孩子坐在舒适的单人沙发上阅读绘本，正微笑着抬头注视着猫咪们。画面色调偏暖，充满质感与高级感，传递出静谧、可靠的陪伴氛围。
description_en: A cinematic, ultra-realistic e-commerce photography shot set in an elegant, high-end large villa living room during a cozy evening. The ambient lighting is incredibly warm and inviting, originating from a modern contemporary fireplace and sophisticated designer floor lamps in the background, casting soft, rich highlights on the plush grey texture of a gigantic 205cm XXL cat tree. The cat tree is positioned prominently in the center-right, with its solid, thick double-layer baseboard anchored firmly at the very bottom edge of the image. The camera utilizes a slight low angle to spectacularly showcase its towering, imposing structure and wide horizontal layout at the bottom. A giant, fluffy Ragdoll cat is vigorously scratching the large sisal ramp at the bottom, demonstrating the product's extreme sturdiness and anti-wobble design. Another massive Maine Coon is sleeping peacefully inside the spacious middle condo. In the beautifully blurred background, a well-dressed mother and her young child are sitting in a cozy armchair reading a book, glancing smilingly affectionately at the cats. High-income lifestyle, luxurious, highly stable, peaceful, 8k, highly detailed, dramatic commercial lighting.
camera_angle: 微仰角拍摄，展现高度与底部横向结构的稳固感
